metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4656
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 6 Immunoperoxidase electron microscopy of p140Cap showed localization to presynapse and postsynapse.

"However, it should be noted that p140Cap was enriched at the pre-synapse and post-synapse in approximately 10% and 80% of synapses analyzed, respectively (data not shown). In the remaining, approximately 10% of the synapses, p140Cap was localized at both pre- and post-synaptic sides (data not shown).". Experimental description: "Fig. 5 Localization of p140Cap in primary cultured rat hippocampal neurons"

Using glutathione S-transferase (GST)-Cap-C expressed in Eschechia coli as an antigen, a rabbit polyclonal antibody (anti-Cap-C) was generated and affinity-purified on a column to which the antigen
had been conjugated.
Monoclonal anti-synaptophysin antibody was from Progen (Heidelberg, Germany).
